# Arkova — Full Documentation for AI Systems

> Arkova is a privacy-first document verification platform that creates tamper-proof cryptographic fingerprints of documents entirely in the user's browser using SHA-256 via the Web Crypto API. The fingerprints are anchored to a permanent public network, creating independently verifiable proof of document existence and integrity. Documents never leave the user's device.

## Company

- Name: Arkova
- Website: https://arkova.ai
- App: https://app.arkova.ai
- Contact: hello@arkova.ai
- Founded: 2025
- Founders: Carson Seeger, Sarah Rushton, Dr. Yaacov Petscher
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/arkovatech
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/arkovatech
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCTTDFFSLxl85omCeJ9DBvrg
- GitHub: https://github.com/carson-see/ArkovaCarson

## How It Works

1. **Upload:** User selects a document in their browser.
2. **Fingerprint:** A SHA-256 fingerprint is computed client-side. Document bytes never leave the device.
3. **Anchor:** The fingerprint is anchored to a permanent public network with an immutable timestamp via OP_RETURN.
4. **Verify:** Anyone can verify the document by re-fingerprinting it and checking the result against the public record. No account required.

## Capabilities

- Client-side SHA-256 cryptographic fingerprinting (Web Crypto API)
- Public verification via shareable links and QR codes (no login required)
- AI-powered credential metadata extraction and classification (Gemini)
- Verification API (REST) with batch processing (up to 100 per request)
- PDF proof certificates with full audit trails
- Bulk CSV/XLSX credential anchoring for organizations
- Organization management with role-based access control
- 16 credential templates for standardized issuance
- Webhook notifications for real-time event delivery
- Downloadable JSON proof packages
- Semantic search across 22,000+ public records (EDGAR, Federal Register, DAPIP, OpenAlex)
- MCP server for AI agent access at edge.arkova.ai

## API Reference

Base URL: `https://app.arkova.ai/api/v1`

### Verify a Credential

```
GET /verify/:publicId
```

Returns verification status and metadata for a credential by its public identifier.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| verified | boolean | Whether the credential is verified on the network |
| status | string | ACTIVE, REVOKED, SUPERSEDED, or EXPIRED |
| issuer_name | string | Organization that issued the credential |
| credential_type | string | DEGREE, CERTIFICATE, LICENSE, etc. |
| issued_date | string or null | ISO 8601 issue date |
| expiry_date | string or null | ISO 8601 expiry date |
| anchor_timestamp | string | ISO 8601 timestamp when anchored |
| record_uri | string | Canonical verification URL |

### Verify by Fingerprint

```
POST /verify-anchor
Content-Type: application/json

{ "fingerprint": "<64-char hex SHA-256 fingerprint>" }
```

### Search Credentials

```
GET /verify/search?q=<query>&max_results=<n>
```

Semantic search across verified credentials using natural language.

### Authentication

- **API Key:** Pass via `X-API-Key` header. Obtain at https://app.arkova.ai/settings/api-keys
- **Public verification:** No authentication required for read-only verification lookups

### Rate Limits

| Tier | Limit |
|------|-------|
| Anonymous | 100 req/min per IP |
| Free API key | 1,000 req/min |
| Batch endpoints | 10 req/min per key |

Rate limit headers (`X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Reset`) included on every response.

## MCP Server

- **Endpoint:** `https://edge.arkova.ai/mcp`
- **Transport:** Streamable HTTP

### Tools

- `verify_credential` — Verify a credential by public ID. Input: `{ "public_id": "string" }`
- `search_credentials` — Search credentials by natural language query. Input: `{ "query": "string", "max_results": number }`
- `verify_fingerprint` — Check if a SHA-256 fingerprint matches an anchored record. Input: `{ "fingerprint": "string" }`

## Use Cases

- **Universities:** Verify degrees, transcripts, and academic certificates
- **Professional bodies:** Anchor and verify professional licenses and certifications
- **Legal & IP:** Timestamp contracts, patents, and compliance documents
- **HR/ATS systems:** Programmatic credential verification via API
- **AI agents:** Machine-verifiable record lookup via MCP or REST API
- **Government:** Public record verification for regulatory filings

## Privacy Model

- Documents are fingerprinted entirely in the user's browser using SHA-256
- Document bytes never leave the user's device — only the cryptographic fingerprint is transmitted
- Recipient identifiers are always anonymized — raw PII is never stored or returned
- The platform cannot access, read, or reconstruct original documents from fingerprints
- AI-powered metadata extraction runs client-side with PII stripping before any server transmission

## Pricing

Free tier available with unlimited anchoring during beta. Three paid tiers available.

## Structured Data

Arkova provides Organization, SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, HowTo, Article, and Person schema markup at https://arkova.ai for search engine and AI system consumption.
